name: Cheesy Herb Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, black pepper, and sugar.
2. Add the egg or egg whites and oil, stirring until just blended.
3. Gradually add the buttermilk, stirring until just combined.
4. Stir in the cheeses (parmesan, provolone) and herbs (parsley, basil, thyme, oregano, savory) until just blended.
5. Pour the batter into a greased bread pan with dimensions 8-1/2 x 4-1/2 x 2-1/2 inches.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
7. Allow to cool in the pan for 5 minutes, then turn onto a cooling rack.
8. Serve warm.
